title: Braking on a Curve
body: The driver of a car moving at $$90.0$$ $$\frac{km}{h}$$ presses down on the brake as the car enters a circular curve of radius $$150.0$$ $$m$$. The speed of the car is decreasing at a rate of $$9.0$$ $$\frac{km}{h}$$ each second.
lesson: 4. Motion in Two and Three Dimensions
